text: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
reflection: This verse reminds us that true strength comes from our faith. No matter what challenges we face today, we have a divine source of power that enables us to overcome them.

text: Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.
reflection: It's easy to rely on our own wisdom, but God sees the bigger picture. When we surrender our plans to Him, He guides our steps and provides clarity amidst confusion.

text: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.
reflection: In moments of darkness or uncertainty, scripture acts as a guiding light. Spending time reading the Bible illuminates the right choices and brings peace to our journey.

text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
reflection: God’s intentions towards us are good. Even when current circumstances are difficult, we can find hope in knowing that He has a purposeful and prosperous future planned for us.

text: But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles; they will run and not grow weary, they will walk and not be faint.
reflection: Waiting and hoping in God replenishes our spiritual energy. We are uplifted and empowered to endure life's marathons without giving up.
